title: Algeria by Motorcycle
route: border gate.El Oued Alg. Tozeur Tns
inclusions: 09 notti in camera doppia in hotel 3/4/5* o migliori in loco
Le colazioni e cene come da programma
Guida locale su mezzo di supporto
excludes: Visa fee. Payable at the customs office.
The price is negotiable depending on the number of people and the number of days.

itinerary.itineraryDays: Entry is through the border crossing between Algeria (Taleb Larbi) and Tunisia (Hazwa). Our guide will handle all entry procedures. The process usually takes 3 hours, depending on the queue. We then proceed toEl Oued  for an overnight stay at a hotel. The distance is 100  km
In the morning, we will head from El Oued  towards Hassi Messaoud and stay overnight at the TFT residence. The distance is approximately 650  km on a paved road.
In the morning we head towards Ain Amenas, then spend the night in the city of Illizi in a hotel. The distance traveled is 520 km.
We depart from Illizi in the morning towards Djanet. We cross the Tassili N'Ajjer mountains. We cover a distance of 400 km and stay overnight at the Hotel Ténéré.

In the morning, We park our motorcycles in the hotel's private parking lot.Then we ride in four-wheel drive vehicles with the agency team.  we continue our tour with an exploration of panoramic views and rock carvings and drawings. Then we head to the Tikopawin Mountains and Sands  to camp in the high sand dunes.

In the morning, we set off from the camp towards the Isendiln Valley, where we explore oases inhabited by nomadic Tuareg people. We delve deeper into the oasis, hiking and exploring on foot. Afterwards, we head to camp in the high sand dunes to watch the enchanting sunset.

We set off in the morning to cross towards high sand dunes Erg Admer, then discover the rock carving of the weeping cow. Afterwards, we enter the town of Djanet to explore the local Tuareg market selling traditional crafts. In the evening, we head to the hotel for the night.
In the morning we set off towards ilezzi . On the way, after 200 km, we discover the Iherir oasis, then continue our journey to spend the night at the ilezzi Hotel.
From Illizi we cross Ain Amenas  Let's stay at the Tin Fouy City Hotel
From Tin Fouye, we head towards Hassi Messaoud and then spend the night in a hotel in Touggourt.
In the morning we head towards the border gate, passing through the city of Al-Wadi. Upon arrival at the gate, our guide will handle the exit procedures.

description:
An original motorcycle journey to discover Algeria, through oases, desert, and breathtaking natural scenery.

An adventure steeped in majestic landscapes, ancient cities, and an authentic and vibrant culture. Crossing this vast North African country on two wheels means enjoying a unique experience, amidst fascinating roads, genuine encounters, and ever-changing panoramas.

Entry through the border gate between Tunisia and Algeria.

An itinerary designed to discover Algeria in all its diversity: from the desert regions on the edge of the Saharan Atlas to the immense expanses of sand and dunes over 100 meters high.Then enter the Tassili N'Ajjer Mountains. An open-air museum. With its towering vertical mountains and red sands.
